description: This scenario simulates a monitoring probe failure by scaling down the OpenTelemetry Demo's `load-generator` deployment to zero.

steps.command: kubectl -n {{ args.kubernetesObject.metadata.namespace }} scale {{ args.kubernetesObject.kind | lower }}/{{ args.kubernetesObject.metadata.name }} --replicas=1
steps.text: Scale the monitoring probe deployment back to at least 1 replica.

steps.command: kubectl -n {{ args.kubernetesObject.metadata.namespace }} rollout restart {{ args.kubernetesObject.kind | lower }}/{{ args.kubernetesObject.metadata.name }}
steps.text: Restart the monitoring probe deployment to recover from a stuck state.
